headline: BioNTech (BNTX) Is Down 7.9% After $2 Billion Bristol Myers Cancer Deal - What's Changed
summary: In recent months, BioNTech has moved further beyond its COVID-19 roots by acquiring Chinese startup Biotheseus and inking a major Bristol Myers partnership around oncology candidate BNT327, which brought in about US$2.00 billion in upfront payments and a 50% royalty share. This deal-making, backed by a strong cash position and a broadening oncology pipeline, underscores BioNTech’s shift toward a multiproduct cancer-focused biotech model with diversified revenue potential. Next, we’ll examine...
